appraisal_events.evidence: « si on dit : “Voilà duc de Guermantes”, personne ne sait qui c’est. » … « du moment que le titre de duc de Brabant est passé … vous pouvez y prétendre »
appraisal_events.explanation: The duchesse undercuts the duke by stressing his lack of public recognition and by questioning his claim to the Brabant title.

appraisal_events.evidence: « depuis neuf cents ans nous tenions le haut du pavé dans toute l’Europe »
appraisal_events.explanation: The duke counters by asserting the ancient superiority of his house, a self-elevating claim meant to trump the duchesse’s criterion of public notoriety.

status_effects.explanation: Locally diminished: he is depicted as unknown to the public and his title-claim is challenged, weakening his immediate standing.
